title: sia-autoresearch run manifest
description: Contract for runs/<run-id>/manifest.json. Agents should self-validate against this before finishing a run. No tooling required — read and compare.

id.description: Run id matching the folder name: YYYY-MM-DD-<kind>-NNN

topic.description: One sharp question, not a laundry list

selectedQueries.description: The exact queries actually run — proof of work, not a wishlist

selectedSources.description: Human-readable source names; clickable links live in notes.md

adversarial.description: Adversarial pass record (spec sections 8-9). Required on substantial runs under spec >= 1.2.0; optional in this schema so pre-1.2.0 runs stay valid. A missing or unperformed pass caps overall score below 0.70.

counterQueries.description: Counter-evidence queries actually run — proof of attack, mirrored from adversarial.md

thesisRevised.description: True when the attack changed memo.md before scoring

summary.description: One line: what attacked the thesis and what survived

claimsDelta.description: Changes this run made to the claims ledger (notes/claims.json, spec section 10). Optional for pre-1.2.0 runs.

publishingFile.description: Path under publishing/queue/ when verdict is send_for_review; otherwise null

specVersion.description: Optional: spec version the run was produced under (e.g. 1.2.0)
